ancient_restore.title: Ancient Find
body: You've uncovered an ancient relic of war. Try restoring it?
A half-buried weapon hums under the mud. It might still be saved.

bandit_toll.title: Bandit's Toll
bandit_toll.body: A bandit blocks your way. He demands 90% of the coins in your possession.

pitfall.title: Hidden Pit
pitfall.body: You lose ground under your feet and fall into a pit. Your legs hurt really much.

old_monk.title: Old Monk
old_monk.body: You've encountered an old monk. He shares his knowledge with you and wishes you good luck.

wishing_well.title: Wishing Well
wishing_well.body: You found a wishing well. Ask carefully.
